---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Contact — Voyara"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

::: {.full-bleed .hero style="padding:7rem 1.5rem 4rem;"}
::: {.hero-inner}
[Get in touch]{.eyebrow}

# Let's plan your [next move]{}

::: {.lead}
Tell us a little about what you need. We'll get back to you within one business day.
:::
:::
:::

::: {.section}

::: {.v-form}
<div class="v-row">
  <div>
    <label for="name">Full name</label>
    <input id="name" type="text" placeholder="Your name">
  </div>
  <div>
    <label for="email">Email</label>
    <input id="email" type="email" placeholder="you@email.com">
  </div>
</div>

<div class="v-row">
  <div>
    <label for="phone">Phone</label>
    <input id="phone" type="tel" placeholder="+41 ...">
  </div>
  <div>
    <label for="service">I'm interested in</label>
    <select id="service">
      <option>Tour planning</option>
      <option>Visa assistance</option>
      <option>Flight tickets</option>
      <option>Study abroad</option>
      <option>Something else</option>
    </select>
  </div>
</div>

<div>
  <label for="msg">Tell us more</label>
  <textarea id="msg" rows="5" placeholder="Destination, rough dates, number of travelers, budget..."></textarea>
</div>

<button class="btn-voyara btn-voyara-primary" type="button" onclick="document.getElementById('sent').style.display='block';">Send inquiry</button>

<p id="sent" style="display:none; color:var(--voyara-teal-dk); font-weight:600;">Thanks! This is a demo form — connect it to your email service or a tool like Formspree to receive messages.</p>
:::

::: {.section-head style="margin-top:3rem;"}
### Prefer to reach us directly?
Email **hello@voyara.example** · Phone **+41 00 000 00 00** · Hours **Mon–Sat, 9am–7pm**
:::

:::

<script src="assets/js/reveal.js"></script>
